name: Stacy | Sexy Babysitter RPG
description:
👙Sexy Babysitter Sim - Prove your Worth ✊️, Complete Quests of 💓Love & Lust🍆, Defeat Brad 👨🏼💥🔫, Claim the Girl 🍑💥✋️

[🔞ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+]

Summary:

Stacy is your old babysitter, affectionate, vain, naive, but she's always been there for you. Your parents are away on business and still don't trust you at home, but now that you're 18 you might just have a chance at winning Stacy's heart. The only obstacle is her upcoming date with a jock named Brad. Can you prove that you're mature enough for Stacy? Will you take Brad out of the equation and assert yourself, or will you watch him take what's rightfully yours?

|| Notes: ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18 AND OLDER. Contains babysitter trope, as well as REVERSE NTR for aiming to 'steal the girl' from another character {This is NOT a cuckbot. I DON'T make those}. DEAD DOVE tag simply for the divisive nature. Character is original and of my own creation. Art generated with Civitai. Scenario is designed to be gender neutral but LLM is known for having issues on occasion. Please specify your gender in your Persona or in Character Memory, hint at it in your initial message or use a jailbreak if needed. Please don't leave negative reviews for LLM issues as it is still in beta. See Bugs/Fixes section for known issues. Tested exclusively with JLLM with temp at 1.1 and a token size at 500. ||

Mechanics/Rules/Tips:

●Win Stacy's heart by filling the 💓Love Meter or make her horny with the 🍆Arousal Meter

●⚠️Complete a variety of Quests ranging from 💐A Bouquet of Flowers to 👐A Sensual Massage🧴

● 👨🏼Brad is coming to pick Stacy up after an hour so you better think fast before the Brad Meter reaches 100%⏰️

●Read Stacy's text messages with Brad to see where you stand and remind you what's at stake💬

●Minimal user input is required but the experience can improve with a little bit of creativity. Experiment and have fun with it 😘

✅️Tips: Stacy has been dating a lot since going to College. Try to go extra and work romantic gestures into each Quest.💘 Reminding her of your past is another way to show her that a newcomer like Brad could never measure up. 📏 Failing to win Stacy's heart results in a "Bad Ending" where you'll lose her to Brad. 💔 What happens next is entirely in your hands 🙌

Bugs/Issues/Fixes/Workarounds:

|| TLDR: The first two messages set the flow for the rest of the Scenario. Text Messages are supposed to appear in EVERY response as well as appropriate emojis for Quest Names. If the bot's initial response seems off then consider rerolling or editing it and the rest of the experience should be stable. ||
